message:
feat(tui): wire background sync/doctor execution for sources management (2noh9.4.9)

SourceSyncRequested now spawns a background thread via Cmd::task() that
loads SourcesConfig, creates SyncEngine, and calls sync_source(). On
completion, SourceSyncCompleted is dispatched with a summary message.

SourceDoctorRequested spawns probe_host() against the configured SSH
host and tallies pass/warn/fail for connectivity, cass installation,
agent data, and disk space. Both are gated with cfg(not(test)) to keep
unit tests synchronous and fast.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
